01 / 07

02 — ABOUT ME

Hega Satriya
Hutama

Sarjana S1 Ilmu Komunikasi di Universitas Sultan Agung Islam Semarang. Berbasis di Semarang, aktif di berbagai organisasi kampus dan proyek digital.

Perjalanan saya dimulai dari kepanitiaan kampus, dari divisi media di Lembaga Kajian Mahasiswa Unissula, naik jadi Wakil Ketua Media & Konten di Fikomedia dan Koordinator Komunikasi BEM Unissula.

Sebagai Content Creator dan Social Media Specialist, saya selalu menjaga konsistensi, dan konten hari ini harus lebih baik dari kemarin.

Core Skills

Copywriting Content Strategy Visual Design Video Editing Social Media Digital Marketing Brand Strategy Public Relations

Study Case Konten
Kreator SIP9
Presentation By:
Hega Satriya
Content Creator
At Skolla.id
Skolla.online 4 Agustus 2025
Konten 1
Kenapa Pensil Bisa Menghapus Tulisan?
Topik: Sains sederhana kehidupan sehari-hari
Durasi: ±45 detik
Scene 1
“Satu hari satu fakta!”
Scene 2
"Pensil itu bukan tinta! Tapi karbon lunak alias grafit. Saat menulis, grafit
cuma nempel di permukaan kertas, nggak menyerap masuk."
Scene 3
Nah, karet penghapus terbuat dari bahan lengket yang 'nangkep' partikel
grafit di atas kertas. Itulah kenapa bisa hilang."
Scene 4
"Seru ya belajar dari hal kecil? Yuk gali lebih banyak bareng Skolla!"
Scene 5
(Logo closing skolla)
Footage/Media Sumber:
Canva element
pngegg.com
Konten 2
Sekolah itu bukan dari Indonesia?
Topik: Fakta Sejarah
Durasi: ±45 detik
Scene 1
Eh, lo pernah kepikiran gak... kenapa sih disebut sekolah? Emangnya itu kata
asli Indonesia?”
Scene 2
“Nah, justru itu menarik. Sekolah tuh sebenernya bukan dari bahasa
Indonesia.”
“Awalnya dari Belanda: school, lalu dari bahasa Latin: schola, dan paling tua
dari bahasa Yunani: skholē.”
Scene 3
“Yang paling unik, skholē artinya ‘waktu luang untuk berpikir dan belajar’.
Bukan kayak sekarang yang penuh PR.”
Scene 4
“Hah?? Jadi sekolah tuh awalnya tempat nyantai?!”
Scene 5
“Yap. Tapi tetap, belajar dari zaman dulu sampai sekarang itu penting.”
“Makanya, biar makin semangat, belajar bareng Skolla yuk!”
https://skolla.online

const certificateData = [ { id: "cert1", tag: "Kampus Merdeka", title: "Sertifikat Keikutsertaan", subtitle: "PT Linkdataku Solusi Indonesia", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523240795612-9a054b0db644?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert2", tag: "MySkill", title: "Certificate of Skill Specialization", subtitle: "Social Media Marketing", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert3", tag: "Pintarnya", title: "Certificate of Completion", subtitle: "Social Media Specialist — Program Profesi", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517245386807-bb43f82c33c4?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert4", tag: "Training Academy", title: "Sertifikat Pelatihan", subtitle: "Training Academy (TA)", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1434030216411-0b793f4b4173?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert5", tag: "Shopee", title: "Certificate", subtitle: "Digital Marketing at Shopee — Marketing Bootcamp", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert6", tag: "Appreciation", title: "Certificate of Appreciation", subtitle: "LENTERA FEBIK", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553484771-047a44eee27b?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert7", tag: "Committee", title: "Sertifikat Panitia", subtitle: "LENTERA FEBIK 2023", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523240795612-9a054b0db644?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert8", tag: "Committee", title: "Sertifikat Panitia", subtitle: "Fakultas Bahasa & Ilmu Komunikasi 2023", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517245386807-bb43f82c33c4?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert9", tag: "Leadership", title: "Sertifikat Kepengurusan", subtitle: "Kepala Dept. Media & Komunikasi", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert10", tag: "Participation", title: "Certificate of Participation", subtitle: "Un-Halt 4U: Your Voice, Your Power", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" }, { id: "cert11", tag: "Committee", title: "Sertifikat Panitia", subtitle: "Seminar Ucomfest 2023", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553484771-047a44eee27b?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" } ]; const designData = [ { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626785774573-4b799315345d?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Feed Instagram Brand Kuliner", desc: "Konsep desain feed Instagram dengan palet warna warm dan estetika food photography. Mencakup 9 grid post, story template, dan highlight cover." }, { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561070791-2526d30994b5?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Poster Event Kampus", desc: "Rancangan poster dan flyer untuk event seminar dan workshop di kampus. Mengutamakan hierarki informasi yang jelas dan visual yang menarik perhatian." }, { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558655146-9f40138edfeb?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Logo & Brand Identity", desc: "Pembuatan logo dan brand guideline untuk UMKM lokal. Meliputi logo primary, secondary, color palette, typography, dan mockup aplikasi." }, { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Konten Media Sosial", desc: "Template konten harian untuk Instagram dan TikTok. Format carousel, single post, dan reels cover dengan gaya modern dan konsisten." }, { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634942537034-2531766767d1?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Infografis & Ilustrasi", desc: "Desain infografis edukatif dan ilustrasi custom untuk keperluan akademik dan konten edukasi di media sosial." }, { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542744094-3a31f272c490?w=1200&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80", title: "Packaging Design", desc: "Konsep desain kemasan produk dengan pendekatan sustainable dan estetika minimalis yang menonjol di rak penjualan." } ]; // ============================================ // RENDER FUNCTIONS // ============================================ function renderExperience() { const grid = document.getElementById('experienceGrid'); grid.innerHTML = experienceData.map((item, i) => `

${item.date}

${item.title}

${item.company}

${item.desc}

`).join(''); } function renderWork() { const grid = document.getElementById('workGrid'); grid.innerHTML = workData.map((item, i) => { const isVideo = item.type === 'video'; const isDesign = item.type === 'design'; const onclick = isDesign ? 'onclick="openDesignPage()"' : `onclick="openModal('${item.id}')"`; return `
${isVideo ? `
` : ''} ${isDesign ? `
` : ''}
${item.tag}

${item.title}

${item.desc}

`; }).join(''); } function renderCertificates() { const track = document.getElementById('certCarousel'); track.innerHTML = certificateData.map(item => `
${item.tag}

${item.title}

${item.subtitle}

`).join(''); } function renderDesign() { const track = document.getElementById('designTrack'); track.innerHTML = designData.map(item => `

${item.title}

${item.desc}

`).join(''); } // ============================================ // MODAL DATA // ============================================ const modalData = {}; workData.forEach(item => { if (item.type === 'video') { modalData[item.id] = { title: item.title, subtitle: item.tag + ' — ' + item.desc.split('.')[0], description: item.desc, video: item.video }; } else if (item.type === 'pdf') { modalData[item.id] = { title: item.title, subtitle: item.tag + ' — ' + item.desc.split('.')[0], description: item.desc, pdf: item.pdf }; } }); certificateData.forEach(item => { modalData[item.id] = { title: item.title, subtitle: item.tag + ' — ' + item.subtitle, description: 'Sertifikat dari ' + item.subtitle + '.', gallery: [item.img] }; }); // ============================================ // MODAL FUNCTIONS // ============================================ function openModal(id) { const data = modalData[id]; if (!data) return; document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = data.title; document.getElementById('modalSubtitle').textContent = data.subtitle; document.getElementById('modalDescription').textContent = data.description; const videoSection = document.getElementById('modalVideoSection'); if (data.video) { videoSection.classList.remove('hidden'); videoSection.innerHTML = `
`; } else { videoSection.classList.add('hidden'); videoSection.innerHTML = ''; } const gallerySection = document.getElementById('modalGallerySection'); if (data.pdf) { gallerySection.classList.remove('hidden'); // Gunakan Google Docs Viewer sebagai fallback yang lebih reliable const pdfUrl = encodeURIComponent(window.location.origin + '/' + data.pdf); gallerySection.innerHTML = `

Dokumen PDF

File dokumen dapat diunduh atau dilihat langsung di bawah ini.

Download PDF

Jika preview tidak muncul, gunakan tombol Download di atas.

`; } else if (data.gallery) { gallerySection.classList.remove('hidden'); gallerySection.innerHTML = `

Dokumentasi

${data.gallery.map(img => `
`).join('')}
`; } else { gallerySection.classList.add('hidden'); gallerySection.innerHTML = ''; } document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeModal(event) { if (!event || event.target.id === 'modalOverlay') { document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; document.getElementById('modalVideoSection').innerHTML = ''; } } // ============================================ // FILTER WORK // ============================================ function filterWork(category, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('.work-item').forEach(item => { if (category === 'all' || item.dataset.category === category) { item.style.display = 'block'; requestAnimationFrame(() => { item.style.opacity = '1'; item.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; }); } else { item.style.opacity = '0'; item.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)'; setTimeout(() => item.style.display = 'none', 400); } }); } // ============================================ // MOBILE MENU - FIXED // ============================================ let mobileMenuOpen = false; let scrollPosition = 0; function toggleMobileMenu() { const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenuOverlay'); const btn = document.getElementById('menuBtn'); if (mobileMenuOpen) { // Close menu.classList.remove('open'); btn.classList.remove('active'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); // Restore scroll document.body.style.overflow = ''; document.body.style.position = ''; document.body.style.width = ''; document.body.style.top = ''; document.body.style.height = ''; window.scrollTo(0, scrollPosition); mobileMenuOpen = false; } else { // Open scrollPosition = window.scrollY; document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; document.body.style.position = 'fixed'; document.body.style.width = '100%'; document.body.style.top = `-${scrollPosition}px`; document.body.style.height = '100vh'; menu.classList.add('open'); btn.classList.add('active'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); mobileMenuOpen = true; } } function handleMobileNav() { toggleMobileMenu(); // Delay scroll sedikit biar menu nutup dulu setTimeout(() => { const hash = event.target.getAttribute('href'); if (hash) { const el = document.querySelector(hash); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } }, 300); event.preventDefault(); } // ============================================ // SCROLL & NAVIGATION // ============================================ const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section'); const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.section-dot'); const progressBar = document.getElementById('progressBar'); const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav'); let currentSection = 0; let lastScrollY = 0; function updateActiveSection() { const scrollY = window.scrollY; const docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight; progressBar.style.width = (scrollY / docHeight * 100) + '%'; // Hide/show nav on scroll direction if (scrollY > 100) { nav.classList.add('scrolled'); if (scrollY > lastScrollY && scrollY > 300) { nav.classList.add('hidden-nav'); } else { nav.classList.remove('hidden-nav'); } } else { nav.classList.remove('scrolled'); nav.classList.remove('hidden-nav'); } lastScrollY = scrollY; let maxVisible = 0, activeIndex = 0; sections.forEach((section, index) => { const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect(); const visible = Math.min(rect.bottom, window.innerHeight) - Math.max(rect.top, 0); if (visible > maxVisible) { maxVisible = visible; activeIndex = index; } }); if (activeIndex !== currentSection) { currentSection = activeIndex; dots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.classList.toggle('active', i === currentSection)); } } let ticking = false; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!ticking) { window.requestAnimationFrame(() => { updateActiveSection(); ticking = false; }); ticking = true; } }); document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 'PageDown') { e.preventDefault(); const next = Math.min(currentSection + 1, sections.length - 1); sections[next].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'PageUp') { e.preventDefault(); const prev = Math.max(currentSection - 1, 0); sections[prev].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } else if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeModal(); if (document.getElementById('designPage').classList.contains('open')) closeDesignPage(); if (mobileMenuOpen) toggleMobileMenu(); } }); function scrollToSection(id) { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } // ============================================ // REVEAL OBSERVER // ============================================ const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add('visible'); // Trigger counter animation if inside const counters = entry.target.querySelectorAll('.counter-value'); counters.forEach(counter => animateCounter(counter)); } }); }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' }); // ============================================ // COUNTER ANIMATION // ============================================ function animateCounter(el) { if (el.dataset.animated) return; el.dataset.animated = 'true'; const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target); const suffix = el.textContent.includes('%') ? '%' : '+'; const duration = 2000; const start = performance.now(); function update(now) { const elapsed = now - start; const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1); const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3); // ease out cubic const current = Math.floor(eased * target); el.textContent = current + suffix; if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(update); } requestAnimationFrame(update); } // ============================================ // CAROUSEL // ============================================ const carousel = document.getElementById('certCarousel'); const progressBarEl = document.getElementById('certProgressBar'); const arrowLeft = document.getElementById('certArrowLeft'); const arrowRight = document.getElementById('certArrowRight'); let carouselIndex = 0; const itemWidth = 364; // 340 + 24 gap const totalItems = certificateData.length; let visibleItems = Math.max(1, Math.floor(window.innerWidth / itemWidth)); let maxIndex = Math.max(0, totalItems - visibleItems); function updateCarousel() { const offset = carouselIndex * itemWidth; carousel.style.transform = `translateX(-${offset}px)`; const progress = ((carouselIndex + visibleItems) / totalItems) * 100; progressBarEl.style.width = Math.min(progress, 100) + '%'; arrowLeft.classList.toggle('disabled', carouselIndex === 0); arrowRight.classList.toggle('disabled', carouselIndex >= maxIndex); } function moveCarousel(direction) { carouselIndex += direction; if (carouselIndex < 0) carouselIndex = 0; if (carouselIndex > maxIndex) carouselIndex = maxIndex; updateCarousel(); } // Touch support for carousel let carouselTouchStartX = 0; carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { carouselTouchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX; }, { passive: true }); carousel.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { const diff = carouselTouchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].clientX; if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) { if (diff > 0) moveCarousel(1); else moveCarousel(-1); } }, { passive: true }); window.addEventListener('resize', () => { visibleItems = Math.max(1, Math.floor(window.innerWidth / itemWidth)); maxIndex = Math.max(0, totalItems - visibleItems); if (carouselIndex > maxIndex) carouselIndex = maxIndex; updateCarousel(); }); // ============================================ // DESIGN CAROUSEL // ============================================ let designSlideIndex = 0; let designTotal = designData.length; const designTrack = document.getElementById('designTrack'); const designDotsContainer = document.getElementById('designDots'); const designCounter = document.getElementById('designCounter'); function updateDesignCarousel() { designTrack.style.transform = `translateX(-${designSlideIndex * 100}%)`; document.getElementById('designPrev').classList.toggle('disabled', designSlideIndex === 0); document.getElementById('designNext').classList.toggle('disabled', designSlideIndex === designTotal - 1); document.querySelectorAll('.design-dot').forEach((dot, i) => dot.classList.toggle('active', i === designSlideIndex)); designCounter.textContent = `${String(designSlideIndex + 1).padStart(2, '0')} / ${String(designTotal).padStart(2, '0')}`; } function moveDesignSlide(dir) { designSlideIndex += dir; if (designSlideIndex < 0) designSlideIndex = 0; if (designSlideIndex >= designTotal) designSlideIndex = designTotal - 1; updateDesignCarousel(); } function goToDesignSlide(index) { designSlideIndex = index; updateDesignCarousel(); } function openDesignPage() { document.getElementById('designPage').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; designSlideIndex = 0; updateDesignCarousel(); } function closeDesignPage() { document.getElementById('designPage').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } // Touch support for design carousel let designTouchStartX = 0; designTrack.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { designTouchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX; }, { passive: true }); designTrack.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { const diff = designTouchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].clientX; if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) { if (diff > 0) moveDesignSlide(1); else moveDesignSlide(-1); } }, { passive: true }); // ============================================ // MOUSE SPOTLIGHT EFFECT ON CARDS // ============================================ document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { document.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(card => { const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 100; const y = ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 100; card.style.setProperty('--mouse-x', `${x}%`); card.style.setProperty('--mouse-y', `${y}%`); }); }); // ============================================ // INIT // ============================================ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { renderExperience(); renderWork(); renderCertificates(); renderDesign(); // Build design dots for (let i = 0; i < designTotal; i++) { const dot = document.createElement('div'); dot.className = 'design-dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : ''); dot.onclick = () => goToDesignSlide(i); designDotsContainer.appendChild(dot); } // Observe reveals document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-scale, .reveal-left, .reveal-right').forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el)); updateActiveSection(); updateCarousel(); updateDesignCarousel(); });
